---
title: "Analysis of dormancy in DTC"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---



# Analysis of experiments

- [In-vivo drug treatment](drug_treatment-in_vivo-analysis.html)

- [Time-series of DTC counts](dtc-timeseries-analysis.html)


# BR16 DTC
- [Differential expression](br16-dtc-rnaseq-dge.html)

- [Re-categorze dormant samples with hierarchical clustering](br16-dtc-rnaseq-dormant-classification.html) 

# BR16 cell culture

- [Differential expression](br16-cell_culture-rnaseq-dge.html)


# BR16 DTC adnd cell culture comparison
- [Comparison of xenograft and bulk results ](br16-rnaseq-compare-experiments-hclust.html)
